task: Frontend Batch 4A - Editor and Rendered Content Theme Readability
summary: Improved light and dark mode readability for Tiptap editor and rendered content code blocks using shared theme tokens and focused tests.
intentionallyNotChanged: public API error-boundary behavior and tests

testsAdded.coverage: pre/code preservation, inline code distinction, Korean text, multiline whitespace
Tiptap code block shared readable styling hook
deterministic public rendered content code block computed styles in light and dark mode

validations.command: PLAYWRIGHT_EXTERNAL_SERVER=1 PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3000 npm run test:e2e -- tests/dark-mode.spec.ts --grep "DM-18"
PLAYWRIGHT_EXTERNAL_SERVER=1 PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3000 npm run test:e2e -- tests/dark-mode.spec.ts

validations.details: 65 files / 369 tests; known baseline Pact V3 and jsdom navigation warnings appeared

risks: Existing saved Tiptap code blocks with old classes rely on stronger prose selectors for visual normalization.
Admin AI preview receives shared prose styling but AI-specific tests were deferred by scope.
Work detail content receives shared renderer styling but WorkVideo browser recovery remained out of scope.
recommendation: Proceed to the AI failure and partial-failure batch if the prior WorkVideo browser recovery baseline remains accepted; this change is also safe to carry into any remaining WorkVideo Browser Recovery Flow.
